data.title: Market Sentiment Remains Bearish as Funding Rates Indicate Downtrend
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that current funding rates across major centralized and decentralized exchanges indicate a bearish market sentiment. The funding rates for mainstream cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying chart.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee, to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring contract prices remain close to asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% signifies a baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it suggests a bullish market sentiment. Conversely, a rate below 0.005% indicates a bearish outlook.

data.title: US Banks Sued After Artificial Intelligence Sparks $20,000 Fraudulent Transfer: Report
data.description:

data.title: $2,300,000 Payout Incoming After Settlement Reached Over Massive US Data Breach Impacting 71,000+ Victims
data.description:
The victims of a massive US data breach are set to receive their share of a multi-million-dollar settlement. A court has issued the preliminary approval of a deal that awards a total of $2. 3 million to the more than 71,000 victims impacted by a cybersecurity attack at Sysco, a major food distribution company

data.title: Security company Hacken's token HAI plummeted due to a major security vulnerability, suspected of being manipulated by the contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Cointelegraph, the token HAI of Web3 security company Hacken plummeted by 97.1%, and the current trading price is only $0.009023, a 24-hour drop of 40.7%. According to security monitoring agency reports, the plunge may be related to a major security vulnerability. Preliminary investigations show that the incident may have been exploited by attackers due to permission vulnerabilities, manipulating contracts to abnormally transfer about $2.3 million in assets. Hacken has confirmed the incident on the X platform and recommended that token holders of the affected network temporarily stop transferring assets until the situation becomes clear.

data.title: Stablecoins Could Become Key Funding Source for U.S. Government
data.description:
According to Odaily, the GENIUS Act was passed by the U.S. Senate this week, potentially positioning stablecoins as a significant funding source for the U.S. government. U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has praised the GENIUS Act, suggesting that a regulated and expanding stablecoin market could create new buyers for U.S. government debt, thereby increasing private sector demand for U.S. Treasury securities. Besant previously informed the U.S. House Financial Services Committee in May that there is speculation the stablecoin market could demand up to $2 trillion in U.S. government securities in the coming years.

However, analysts caution that the stablecoin industry is unlikely to fully resolve the U.S. government's debt financing challenges and may introduce additional risks. The increased demand for stablecoins will require time to develop, while the U.S. Treasury needs to issue a substantial amount of debt securities within a year. If issues arise that prevent the Federal Reserve from lowering interest rates, the U.S. deficit could spiral out of control.

data.title: UpTop.meme: Screening out script studio addresses through fund path analysis and launching a real user compensation plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UpTop.meme said in a statement: "We have seen many users report that they were unable to successfully participate in the Pre-TGE allocation, and we are deeply sorry for this. We have also noticed that some script studios have shown off their bulk script purchases on social media, infringing on the interests of real users. In order to protect the community's right to know, UpTop engineers and Four.Meme engineers conducted data tracking and on-chain analysis overnight. The results showed that by tracking the capital path, analyzing the similarity of transaction amounts and timing, and identifying abnormal call patterns, we classified the participating addresses. After comprehensive analysis, there are 58,297 suspected script studio addresses and 41,703 real user addresses. In addition, more than 600,000 users visited the Four.Meme event page waiting to participate on time Pre-TGE, and Script Studio completely bypassed the interface through on-chain calls, causing a large number of users to miss opportunities. In order to live up to the trust of users and take responsibility, we decided to launch the "Real User Compensation Program". We will verify the user addresses currently in the queue through on-chain behavior analysis. Addresses identified as real users will receive additional airdrop rewards. This compensation will come from the newly added compensation allocation pool and will not affect the existing plan. The specific rules and distribution method will be announced in the next 48 hours. ”

data.title: Analysis: Stablecoins may become a new tool for US Treasury Secretary Bessant to make up for the deficit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News After the GENIUS Act was passed by the U.S. Senate this week, stablecoins have the potential to become an important source of funding for the U.S. government, and may even become a new tool for U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant to make up for the country's deficit. Bessant previously praised the GENIUS Act and said that a regulated and growing stablecoin market could create new buyers for U.S. government debt and drive private sector demand for U.S. Treasuries. Bessant previously told the U.S. House of Representatives Financial Services Committee in May that some speculate that the stablecoin market's demand for U.S. government securities could be as high as $2 trillion in the next few years.
However, analysts believe that the stablecoin industry is unlikely to completely solve the U.S. government's debt financing problem, and may bring additional risks, because the additional demand for stablecoins takes time to develop, and the U.S. Treasury has to issue a large number of debt securities within a year. If problems arise and the Federal Reserve cannot cut interest rates, the U.S. deficit will get out of control. (CNBC)

data.title: Peter Schiff Slams USD Stablecoins, Plans To Launch Gold-Backed Alternative
data.description:
Peter Schiff has criticized USD stablecoins as weak digital assets pegged to a declining fiat system. His remarks follow new legislation being pushed forward to endorse the use of stablecoins in the United States. Peter Schiff Criticizes USD Stablecoins as Weak Assets Notably, Peter Schiff publicly questioned the foundation of USD-pegged stablecoins
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/21/peter-schiff-slams-usd-stablecoins-plans-to-launch-gold-backed-alternative/
